basic_details.job_title: ICAR IARI Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: The Indian Agricultural Research Institute (ICAR IARI) has published the Project Assistant Notification 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 2 Project Assistant positions. Candidates with a maximum age limit of 35 years and holding 10th pass qualification or Graduation in any stream are eligible to apply through the Walk-in process. The walk-in interview will be conducted on 13 August 2026, and candidates can easily access the notification PDF and apply details below.

application_fee.all_categories_fee: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Maximum age is 35 years. Age relaxation of five years for SC/ST & women and three years for OBC as per Gol norms.

qualification.details: Technical staff: Graduation in any stream from a recognized College/University. Desirable: In science stream preferably. Experience in lab or field experiment, extension work, knowledge of computer, and experience in survey work. Able to speak Nepali/Bengali beside Hindi and English. Semi-skilled worker: 10th pass. Work experience in field survey, sample collection, and Knowledge in basic computer application (MS-Office). Able to speak Nepali/Bengali beside Hindi and English.

salary_details.details: Technical staff: Rs. 20,000/month Semi-skilled worker: Rs. 10,000/month

_labels.notification_pdf: Download ICAR IARI Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download ICAR IARI Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: ICAR IARI Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the ICAR IARI Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download ICAR IARI Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: ICAR IARI Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Technical staff: Graduation in any stream from a recognized College/University. Desirable: In science stream preferably. Experience in lab or field experiment, extension work, knowledge of computer, and experience in survey work. Able to speak Nepali/Bengali beside Hindi and English. Semi-skilled worker: 10th pass. Work experience in field survey, sample collection, and Knowledge in basic computer application (MS-Office). Able to speak Nepali/Bengali beside Hindi and English.

rows.fee: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: ICAR IARI Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum age is 35 years. Age relaxation of five years for SC/ST & women and three years for OBC as per Gol norms.

content_sections.heading: ICAR IARI Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Technical staff: Rs. 20,000/month Semi-skilled worker: Rs. 10,000/month

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for ICAR IARI Various Posts Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to submit applications for the ICAR IARI Project Assistant posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit applications for the ICAR IARI Project Assistant posts is 07 August 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the walk-in interview date for the ICAR IARI recruitment?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the ICAR IARI Project Assistant positions will be conducted on 13 August 2026. Candidates are advised to arrive on time.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for the Project Assistant posts?
faq.answer: For the Technical staff post, a Graduation in any stream is required, preferably in science. For the Semi-skilled worker post, a 10th pass is the minimum qualification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Project Assistant positions?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all Project Assistant posts is 35 years. Age relaxations are applicable for SC/ST, women, and OBC candidates as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant posts?
faq.answer: The salary for the Technical staff post is Rs. 20,000 per month, and for the Semi-skilled worker post, it is Rs. 10,000 per month.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the Project Assistant posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Project Assistant posts at ICAR IARI, with one each for Technical staff and Semi-skilled worker.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview in person with all required documents.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: You must carry all original certificates, date of birth certificate, degree certificate (original or provisional), one set of self-attested photocopies of all required certificates from matriculation onwards, and a recent passport-size photograph.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the walk-in interview for ICAR IARI recruitment being held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at the ICAR-Indian Agricultural Research Institute, Regional Station, Kalimpong, West Bengal.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any application fee for the ICAR IARI Project Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for the ICAR IARI Project Assistant recruitment. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.
